title: Laravel: route.matched
description: Laravel matched a route before running the controller.

methods.description: Comma-separated HTTP methods the route accepts.

handler.description: Controller@method string or closure class name.

requestId.description: Correlation ID for the request, set by the AssignRequestId middleware via Laravel's shared log context. The value comes from the Request-Id or X-Request-Id request header, or is a generated UUID. Present only when that middleware is enabled.
